# Da Ollys Integrated Services Ltd
> Elite logistics, haulage, property relocation, luxury vehicle rentals, private jet charters, and global travel consulting. Based in Port Harcourt, Nigeria.

## Core services
- [International & Local Travel Bookings](https://daollysintegrated.com/services/travels): Flights, visas, hotels, tour packages, study abroad programs
- [Logistics & Dispatch Service](https://daollysintegrated.com/services/deliveries): Same-day courier, parcel delivery in Port Harcourt
- [Luxury Car Rentals](https://daollysintegrated.com/services/luxury-car-rentals): Premium chauffeur-driven vehicles, wedding fleets
- [Private Jet & VIP Charter](https://daollysintegrated.com/services/private-jet-charter): Private jet hire, helicopter shuttles, VIP aviation

## About
- [About Us](https://daollysintegrated.com/about): Corporate mission, pillars, and quality pledge
- [Contact](https://daollysintegrated.com/contact): Phone, email, office hours, contact form
